HomeStartup Forum

Indian Aerospace Startup Forum (IASF)

From Idea to Impact - Empowering Aerospace Entrepreneurs

Launched December 2024

About the Forum

The Indian Aerospace Startup Forum (IASF) is an initiative of IAAA to identify, nurture, and accelerate promising aerospace, aviation, and drone-tech innovations across India.

The forum connects students, faculties, researchers, and innovators with mentors, investors, and industry partners to transform ideas into market-ready solutions.

Submit Your IdeaJoin IASF

Our Focus Areas

Aviation & Airlines
Drone Technology
Space Tech & Satellites
Defense & Aerospace
Advanced Materials
MRO & Manufacturing

How It Works

A structured pathway from ideation to market

01

Identify the Right Idea

Through national competitions and Collegiate Club projects, we discover promising innovations.

02

Incubate Under IAAA PTDC

Refine design, develop prototypes, and test with experienced mentors.

03

Validate Market Fit

Engage with IAAA industry and startup partners for application trials.

04

Access Funding & Tech Transfer

Pitch to investors and access IAAA-backed tech transfer opportunities.

Who Can Apply?

  • Engineering students and college teams
  • Faculty innovators and research groups
  • Startups and MSMEs in aviation or drone sectors
  • Innovators seeking industry partnerships or funding

Benefits

Technical Mentorship

Guidance from IAAA experts and industry leaders

Lab Access

Access to PTDC labs and partner facilities

Pitch Events

National-level pitch events and demo days

Fellowships

Eligibility for IAAA Startup Fellowship & Innovation Grants

Industry Support

Industry-backed proof-of-concept development

Launch Support

From ideation to market-ready product

Ready to Launch Your Aerospace Innovation?

Join the Indian Aerospace Startup Forum and transform your ideas into reality.

Submit Your IdeaBecome a Partner
